t_ch: 那些怪物原本都是「美梦剧团」，工作认真，训练有素，服从家族的管理，为来往宾客提供消遣和服务。对，都是乖孩子。
t_en: All those monsters used to be part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe — hard-working, well-trained, and obedient to The Family, providing amusement and service to the guests. Yeah, they were all good children.

t_ch: 直到…噩梦的侵袭，把它们变成了怪物。就是你现在看到的样子。疯疯癫癫，胡言乱语。
t_en: Until... the nightmare struck and turned them into monsters. The form that you now see, insane and babbling.

t_ch: 有什么解决的办法吗？
t_en: Is there a solution to this?

t_ch: 就是你现在正在做的事，调制合适的饮料，聆听客人的想法，安抚它们的情绪。
t_en: The solution is what you're doing now — making the right drinks, listening to your guests' thoughts, and calming them down.

t_ch: 我不觉得它们很奇怪。
t_en: I don't think they're strange.

t_ch: 你可真会说话，就是这么把那群孩子骗得服服帖帖的？别多想，是在夸你呢。
t_en: You're quite a smooth talker. Is this how you tricked those children? Oh, don't get me wrong. It's a compliment.

t_ch: 在成为酒吧的调饮师前，我曾经是「美梦剧团」的管理员。说是管理者，但我始终把那些孩子当家人在看待。所以，看到它们变成这样，我很痛心。
t_en: Before becoming a drinksmith, I used to be the administrator of the Sweet Dreams Troupe. My title might have been their administrator, but I treated them like my own family. That's why it hurts me to see them in this state.

t_ch: 我守在这，希望能帮到它们…变得正常点，能重新得到人们的认可，过上开心的生活。
t_en: So, I decided to stay here, hoping that I could help them... get a bit normal again. That they can regain recognition from the people and have happy lives.

t_ch: 但这个过程实在太漫长了。即使暂时解决了怪物的情绪问题，噩梦仍然会再度袭来，周而复始，没有尽头。
t_en: But the process was too long. Even with the monsters' emotional issues temporarily placated, the nightmares will still return time and time again, with no end in sight.

t_ch: 我也…有点累了。
t_en: And I'm starting to... feel tired.

t_ch: …所以才找我来帮忙吗？
t_en: ...So, that's why you asked me for help?

t_ch: 没有彻底的解决办法吗？
t_en: Can't we resolve this problem once and for all?

t_ch: 呼…有点困了。
t_en: Well... I'm getting a bit sleepy.

t_ch: 这次的故事就到这，后面有机会再讲吧。
t_en: That's all for now. I'll tell you more later when a chance arises.

t_ch: 用来采撷灵感的氛围已经足够，请——给我调份<color=#dbc291ff>怀旧风格，超大杯，带着微微甜，味道又特别强烈</color>的饮料吧。
t_en: I have enough atmosphere to generate inspiration now. Please, make me a drink that brings feelings of <color=#dbc291ff>nostalgia, in an extra large glass, and is slightly sweet. Its taste should be particularly strong</color>!

t_ch: …味道非常棒。除了加拉赫外，你是我见过的人里面学习调饮最快的了，真不打算在这家酒吧长期干下去？
t_en: ...It tastes great. Besides Gallagher, you're the fastest learner I've ever met when it comes to mixing drinks. Are you really not planning on working at this lounge for a long time?

t_ch: 饮品无论好坏，代表的都是当下最真实的想法，对面前这位客人的理解，以及你打算如何回应对方的信任，看似简单，里面蕴含的东西可多着呢。
t_en: Drinks, whether they taste great or terrible, reflect your most genuine thoughts at this moment, how you understand the guest before you, and how you intend to respond to their trust. This might seem simple, but it's so much more than that.

t_ch: …对了，还有件事要跟你说下。
t_en: ...Oh, there's something else I need to tell you.

t_ch: 尽管在家族看来，「美梦剧团」只是供宾客娱乐的道具，但对它们感兴趣的人不在少数。跟我打过招呼，来酒吧光顾的也有好几个。
t_en: Even though The Family treats the Sweet Dreams Troupe as mere props for the guests' entertainment, there are quite a few people who take a genuine interest in them. Some have even told me about it and become regulars at the lounge.

t_ch: 你要是有兴趣，也可以邀请信任的朋友过来玩。
t_en: If you're interested, you can also invite your trusted friends here.

t_ch: 梦境酒店不是被家族封锁了？
t_en: But isn't the hotel in the Dreamscape sealed off by The Family?

t_ch: 说是我的客人就行，家族的守卫不会拦你。不过是群服从命令的猎犬罢了，别太给他们面子。
t_en: Just tell them you're my guest, and The Family's guards won't stop you. They're merely obedient Bloodhounds following orders. Don't take them too seriously.

t_ch: 把怪物的事透露出去可以吗？
t_en: Is it really okay to tell others about the monsters?

t_ch: 说实话，会有一定的风险，家族始终希望能清理掉那些怪物。但我相信你的判断。
t_en: To be honest, this is a bit risky, as The Family always intend to wipe out those monsters. However, I have faith in your judgment.

t_ch: 就到这吧。你也累了，好好休息。这条路还很长，也会比你预想的更加艰难。
t_en: That's all for now. You must be tired too. Get some rest. The road ahead is long, and it'll be tougher than you expect.

t_ch: 嗯…味道还算过得去，但似乎有点破坏现在的气氛了。
t_en: Hmm... the flavor is okay, but it kinda kills the current vibe.

t_ch: 饮品无论好坏，代表的都是当下最真实的想法，对面前这位客人的理解，以及你打算如何回应对方的信任，看似简单，里面蕴含的东西可多着呢。
t_en: Drinks, whether they taste great or terrible, reflect your most genuine thoughts at this moment, how you understand the guest before you, and how you intend to respond to their trust. This might seem simple, but it's so much more than that.

t_ch: …对了，还有件事要跟你说下。
t_en: ...Oh, there's something else I need to tell you.

t_ch: 尽管在家族看来，「美梦剧团」只是供宾客娱乐的道具，但对它们感兴趣的人不在少数。跟我打过招呼，来酒吧光顾的也有好几个。
t_en: Even though The Family treats the Sweet Dreams Troupe as mere props for the guests' entertainment, there are quite a few people who take a genuine interest in them. Some have even told me about it and become regulars at the lounge.

t_ch: 你要是有兴趣，也可以邀请信任的朋友过来玩。
t_en: If you're interested, you can also invite your trusted friends here.

t_ch: 梦境酒店不是被家族封锁了？
t_en: But isn't the hotel in the Dreamscape sealed off by The Family?

t_ch: 说是我的客人就行，家族的守卫不会拦你。不过是群服从命令的猎犬罢了，别太给他们面子。
t_en: Just tell them you're my guest, and The Family's guards won't stop you. They're merely obedient Bloodhounds following orders. Don't take them too seriously.

t_ch: 把怪物的事透露出去可以吗？
t_en: Is it really okay to tell others about the monsters?

t_ch: 说实话，会有一定的风险，家族始终希望能清理掉那些怪物。但我相信你的判断。
t_en: To be honest, this is a bit risky, as The Family always intend to wipe out those monsters. However, I have faith in your judgment.

t_ch: 就到这吧。你也累了，好好休息。这条路还很长，也会比你预想得更加艰难。
t_en: That's all for now. You must be tired too. Get some rest. The road ahead is long, and it'll be tougher than you expect.

t_ch: 还是从你先开始吧，想知道些什么呢？
t_en: Let's start with you. What would you like to know?

t_ch: …你的真实身份？
t_en: ...Your true identity?

t_ch: …怪物的真实情况？
t_en: ...The true nature of those monsters?

t_ch: …这家酒吧的真实目的？
t_en: ...The true purpose of this lounge?

t_ch: 喂喂，别这么急躁…这个问题也太复杂了，一时半会儿怎么说得完？
t_en: Hey, don't rush things... The answer to your question is way too nuanced. How am I supposed to answer them all in one go?

t_ch: 感觉有点渴了，给我来杯<color=#dbc291ff>清爽的饮料吧，口味别太重</color>——其余的任你发挥，我相信你的调饮技术。
t_en: I feel a little parched. Make me a <color=#dbc291ff>refreshing drink, and keep it mild</color> — I'll leave the rest to you. I trust your mixology skills.
Hmm...

t_ch: 品尝你调出来的饮料总会让我想起很多事…你真的没有偷偷对我使用那个神奇的能力？
t_en: Tasting the drinks you make always brings back memories... You didn't secretly use your magical ability on me, did you?

t_ch: 当然没有。
t_en: Of course not.

t_ch: 你猜有没有？
t_en: Why not take a guess?

t_ch: …没有的话，要不对我使用试试，看你能不能成功？
t_en: ...No? Maybe you can try using it on me and see if it works?

t_ch: 开玩笑的。这么说是因为，只要坐在你的对面，就会感觉特别放松，像是一场温暖舒适的梦。可惜呀，梦终究是没法长久的…就像这间酒店一样。
t_en: Just kidding. I say that because as long as I sit opposite you, I'd feel super relaxed like I'm in a warm, cozy dream. Unfortunately, dreams don't last forever... just like this hotel.

t_ch: 抱歉。对这家「惊梦酒吧」，我应该解释得更清楚些的。
t_en: I'm sorry. I should have explained everything about this Dreamjolt Hostelry better.

t_ch: 这些怪物在平时没有表现出攻击性，是因为有你为它们调制饮料的缘故。酒吧提供的饮料对它们而言会有稳定情绪的功效，能在一定程度上抵抗噩梦的侵袭。
t_en: Those monsters don't show aggression most of the time because of your drinks. The drinks offered here can stabilize their emotions, helping them resist the nightmare corruption to some extent.

t_ch: 要是不给它们调制饮料呢？
t_en: What if we stop making them drinks?

t_ch: 就像你看到的这样，失去理性，胡乱攻击周围的对象，直至…彻底无法恢复。
t_en: Just as you saw, they'll lose their sanity and start attacking everything around them until... until they're beyond recovery.

t_ch: 这些饮料是你特意准备的？
t_en: Did you prepare these drinks on purpose?

t_ch: 当然，准备这些材料花费了我不少心思，好在确实收到了成效。
t_en: Of course. It took me a lot of effort to gather the ingredients. Luckily, my efforts paid off.

t_ch: 要是离开这些特制的饮料，它们就会失去理性，胡乱攻击周围的对象，直至…彻底无法恢复。
t_en: Without these special drinks, those monsters will lose their sanity and start attacking everything around them until... until they're beyond recovery.

t_ch: 即使如此，怪物们陷入狂乱的情况仍旧时有发生，到现在甚至越发地频繁。我们所做的，和整个梦境的坍塌比起来不过是杯水车薪罢了。
t_en: Even with my drinks, they still descend into a frenzy from time to time, and it's happening more frequently now. The entire Dreamscape is collapsing, and we're just futilely trying to delay its impact like pouring cold water into a pot about to boil over.

t_ch: 这家酒吧的处境…实则岌岌可危。
t_en: The situation of this lounge... is far from promising.

t_ch: 那小星星会发狂也是…
t_en: So that's why Starlet became frenzied...?

t_ch: 小星星的情况比较特殊。它过去遭遇过太多悲伤的事，所以对酒吧里的陌生人很戒备。
t_en: Well, their situation is a bit different. They have experienced too many tragic events, so they're naturally wary of strangers in the lounge.

t_ch: …别看它好像很有想法的样子，其实内心仍然是个离不开人的孩子，只不过顾虑得太多，没法完全信任你罢了。别太往心里去。
t_en: ...Don't be fooled by their mature look. Deep down, they're still a dependent kid. They're just too wary to completely trust you right away. So, don't take it personally.

t_ch: 等你们更加熟悉后，相信它会向你透露真实的想法。
t_en: I'm sure they'll open up and show their true feelings once you two become more familiar with each other.

t_ch: 至于我…呵，安抚情绪不过是家族的惯用手法，没什么好说的。
t_en: As for me... Well, soothing emotions is what The Family is used to doing, so there's nothing complex about that.

t_ch: 你曾经是它们的管理员。
t_en: You used to be their administrator.

t_ch: 对，我应该说过，但也只是*曾经*。「美梦剧团」是为宾客服务的道具，哪位客人会愿意和一群随时可能发狂的怪物相处呢？
t_en: Yeah. I mentioned that before, but *not anymore*. The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are props entertaining the guests. No guest would want to hang out with a bunch of monsters that could go wild at any moment.

t_ch: 你是家族的成员。
t_en: You're a member of The Family.

t_ch: 对，我应该说过，我曾经是「美梦剧团」的管理员，但也只是*曾经*。
t_en: Yeah, I mentioned that. I used to be the administrator of the Sweet Dreams Troupe, but *not anymore*.

t_ch: 「美梦剧团」是为宾客服务的道具，谁会愿意和一群随时可能发狂的怪物相处呢？
t_en: The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are props entertaining the guests. No guest would want to hang out with a bunch of monsters that could go wild at any moment.

t_ch: 所以后来我就失业啦，只能待在这个酒吧里——照顾这群变得奇怪的孩子们。
t_en: So, I lost my job and could only stay in this lounge... taking care of these quirky kids.

t_ch: 它们对我来说就像家人一样，我不会丢下它们。
t_en: To me, they're like my family, and I'm not leaving them behind.

t_ch: 调杯你最擅长的吧。或者说…你认为现在最适合我的饮品。我们相识的时间不短了，在你心中，最适合我的饮品是什么呢？
t_en: Make me your best drink... or one that you think suits me best right now. We've known each other for quite a while now. So, what do you think is the drink that fits me best?

t_ch: 我期待你的答案。
t_en: I'm looking forward to your answer.

t_ch: 呵。这滋味还真是令人回味无穷。
t_en: Heh, what an intriguing flavor.

t_ch: …看来你很习惯窥探别人的内心嘛？
t_en: ...Looks like you're quite used to peering into people's hearts, right?

t_ch: 说实话，把自己心境全部展露出来的感觉…呵，还真挺难受的，让人很没有安全感啊。
t_en: Honestly, revealing all of my innermost feelings... Hah, it feels pretty bad. It makes you feel vulnerable.

t_ch: 对不起…
t_en: Sorry...

t_ch: 我不是很熟练。
t_en: I'm not quite skilled at it.

t_ch: 没事，现在也顾不得那么多了。继续吧，这杯饮料还没喝完呢。
t_en: Well, we can't pick and choose right now. Let's keep going. I haven't finished my drink yet.

t_ch: 我是个孤儿，不知道父母是谁，没记事的时候就被遗弃在了「白日梦酒店」里，鸢尾花家系的家主梅芙恩收养了我，把我作为未来的明星培养长大。
t_en: I'm an orphan, and I never knew who my parents were. I was abandoned at the Reverie Hotel before I was old enough to remember anything. Maeven, head of the Iris Family, adopted me and raised me as a future star.

t_ch: 我曾在演艺事业上取得了巨大的成功，但终究…我不适合舞台，我不属于那里。
t_en: I once achieved great success in my acting career, but in the end... the stage wasn't for me. I just couldn't fit in.

t_ch: 聚光灯下的生活实在太过喧嚣…我讨厌待在镜头前，讨厌数不尽的演出采访，更讨厌念那些乏味到让我想吐的台本。比起跟吵闹的人群相处，我更愿意待在它们身边。
t_en: Life under the spotlight was too much for me... I despised being in front of the camera, the never-ending interviews, and the mind-numbingly boring scripts. I'd rather be with those monsters than in a rowdy crowd.

t_ch: 我…渴望真正的家人。
t_en: I... long for a real family.

t_ch: 家人…是指「美梦剧团」吗？
t_en: A real family... like the Sweet Dreams Troupe?

t_ch: 对。它们都是单纯的孩子，没什么复杂的心思。和它们呆在一块，让我感到放松，幸福。
t_en: Yeah. They're simple and innocent kids. Being with them brings me peace and happiness.

t_ch: 所以我也见不得那些将它们视作工具，肆意使唤的人。可是，这种人在梦境里实在太多了，自私虚伪，靠着欺负弱者来维持可怜的自尊心。
t_en: That's why I can't stand those who treat them as tools and boss them around. Unfortunately, there are too many selfish and hypocritical people in the Dreamscape, bullying the weak to boost their own pathetic egos.

t_ch: 我离开了舞台，因为想帮助它们。后来你也看到了，梦境开始坍塌，酒店遭到家族封锁，成为了发狂的怪物游荡的场所。
t_en: So, I left the stage because I wanted to help them. You know what happened next: The Dreamscape started collapsing, and the hotel got sealed by The Family and became a spot infested by frenzied monsters.

t_ch: 我留在这里，寻找那些遭到抛弃、但神智仍旧清醒的「美梦剧团」。我建立了这家酒吧，为怪物们调制饮料，想办法安抚情绪，希望能改变它们的命运。
t_en: I stayed here, searching for the abandoned Sweet Dreams Troupe members who were still sane. I established this lounge, making drinks for those monsters and finding ways to calm them down, hoping to change their fate.

t_ch: 它们是我最重要的家人，我不想看它们受伤害。
t_en: They're my most important family, and I don't want to see them get hurt.

t_ch: …是时候面对现实了。
t_en: ...It's time to face reality.

t_ch: 嘿，你好啊！给我来杯…呃，<color=#dbc291ff>带点苦，带点柔和</color>的饮料！
t_en: Hey, how are you! Get me a glass of... Hmm, something <color=#dbc291ff>slightly bitter and mellow</color>!

t_ch: 哇嘎嘎嘎！这就是我想要的，你果然是个好酒保！
t_en: Woah woah woah! This is exactly what I want. I knew you'd be an amazing drinksmith!

t_ch: 饱了！差不多就到这吧，感谢招待！我还会再来的哦。
t_en: I'm full! It's time I stopped. Thank you for your hospitality! I'll come back soon.

t_ch: 啊？…这是啥？能喝吗？我尝一口…喂喂，这不是我要的味道啊！
t_en: Ah? ...What's this? Can you even drink it? Let's have a taste... Hey, this isn't the taste I wanted!

t_ch: 算了，谁叫我这么宽容又善良呢！钱给你，下次记得，嘿嘿…记清楚我的要求。
t_en: Forget it. Good thing I'm generous and kind! Here's your money, but remember next time, heh-heh... make sure you get my order properly.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，又见面了！这次…呃，我想要<color=#dbc291ff>甜的！味道强烈的饮料，还要让人神清气爽</color>才行！
t_en: Hee-hee, we meet again! This time... Er, I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet! And tastes strong! And it has to be refreshing</color>!

t_ch: 哇嘎嘎嘎！这就是我想要的，你果然是个好酒保！
t_en: Woah woah woah! This is exactly what I want. I knew you'd be an amazing drinksmith!

t_ch: 喝饱咯！该走咯！感谢你的接待，下次见！
t_en: I'm full from drinking! I should get going! Thank you for your service. See you next time!

t_ch: 啊？…这是啥？能喝吗？我尝一口…喂喂，这不是我要的味道啊！
t_en: Ah? ...What's this? Can you even drink it? Let's have a taste... Hey, this isn't the taste I wanted!

t_ch: 就这样吧！嘿嘿，随时有饮料喝，还要什么独轮飞车！我走咯！
t_en: That's all! Hee-hee, who needs an Unicycler when I get to drink whenever I want! I'm off!

t_ch: 汪！我就爱你调的饮料哇！请听好——我这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>微微甜，特别柔和，特别清爽的味道</color>！喜欢！
t_en: Woof! I simply love the drinks you make! Please listen carefully — this time, I want something <color=#dbc291ff>that tastes very slightly sweet, very mellow, and very refreshing</color>! Me likey!

t_ch: 汪！这就是我最想要的味道，亲爱的调饮师，你真的好懂我哇！
t_en: Woof! This is the taste I really want! My dear drinksmith, you know me too well!

t_ch: 谢谢你的招待，我还会来找你玩的汪！
t_en: Thank you for your hospitality! I'll come back next time to play with you later, woof!

t_ch: 汪…好像和我预想的不太一样哇，亲爱的调饮师，你是没认真工作嘛？
t_en: Woof... It's a little different from what I expected. My dear drinksmith, are you sure you're serious about your job?

t_ch: 这次就原谅你了，下次要好好地招待我哇！
t_en: I'll forgive you this time, but please be more attentive in the future!

t_ch: 汪！我来找你玩了！请给我一杯<color=#dbc291ff>超级甜，味道强烈，口感浓厚</color>的饮品！喝不到你调的饮料，我就觉得好无聊哇！
t_en: Woof! I've come to play with you! Please give me a glass of something <color=#dbc291ff>super sweet, strong-tasting, and thickly textured</color>! I'm bored out of my mind when I don't get to drink your mixed concoctions!

t_ch: 汪！这就是我最想要的味道，亲爱的调饮师，你真的好懂我哇！
t_en: Woof! This is the taste I really want! My dear drinksmith, you know me too well!

t_ch: 好喝的饮料！好开心哇！谢谢你汪！
t_en: A tasty drink! Happy! Thank you, woof!

t_ch: 汪…好像和我预想的不太一样哇，亲爱的调饮师，你是没认真工作嘛？
t_en: Woof... It's a little different from what I expected. My dear drinksmith, are you sure you're serious about your job?

t_ch: 要是舒翁发现了会批评你的哇，我先帮你保密，但下次要好好接待我汪！
t_en: Siobhan will reprimand you if she finds out. I'll help you keep it a secret first, but I hope you'll treat my order more seriously next time, woof!

t_ch: 您好。我来打扰了。方便的话，能给我调杯饮料吗，就要<color=#dbc291ff>有点苦，味道超级强烈的，颜色分成三层</color>。麻烦了！
t_en: Hello, sorry to bother you. Can you make a drink for me? I want something that's <color=#dbc291ff>a little bitter, tastes super strong, and is layered in three colors</color>. Thank you for the trouble!

t_ch: 哈！您真是位优秀的调饮师，调出来的饮料正正好好就是我想要的！
t_en: Ha! You're truly a superb drinksmith — your drinks are exactly the way I want them!

t_ch: 非常满足！我这次就先离开了，感谢您的招待！
t_en: I'm very pleased! I'll be leaving now. Thank you for your hospitality!

t_ch: 呃…您是不是太累了，发挥有些失常。没事的，您调出来的饮料，我都能喝！
t_en: Err... You don't seem like yourself. Are you too tired? It's all right. I'll drink anything you make!

t_ch: 请好好休息，我还会再来光临，希望届时能见识到您的真实水平！
t_en: Please have a good rest. I'll be back again soon — I hope to witness your true skill when I swing by!

t_ch: …我过来没给您添麻烦吧？要是有时间的话，麻烦给我调杯<color=#dbc291ff>超级甜，口感浓厚的饮料，颜色就分两层</color>好了。万分感谢！
t_en: ...I hope I'm not troubling you by coming over? If you have time, please make me something <color=#dbc291ff>super sweet and thick. Colors in two layers please</color>. Many thanks!

t_ch: 哈！您真是位优秀的调饮师，调出来的饮料正正好好就是我想要的！
t_en: Ha! You're truly a superb drinksmith — your drinks are exactly the way I want them!

t_ch: 在我的心目中，您已经达到了和舒翁相近的水平！我还会来拜访的，向您致敬！
t_en: In my heart, you've already achieved the same level as Siobhan! I'll come back to visit and pay tribute!

t_ch: 呃…您是不是太累了，发挥有些失常。没事的，您调出来的饮料，我都能喝！
t_en: Err... You don't seem like yourself. Are you too tired? It's all right. I'll drink anything you make!

t_ch: 这次的拜访就到此为止，感谢接待！
t_en: That's it for this visit. Thank you for your hospitality!

t_ch: 看啊，奇妙的命运让我们再度相遇了。为了庆祝这来之不易的重逢，请您调杯饮料吧，<color=#dbc291ff>需要梦幻风格，口感很浓厚的类型，别忘了将知更鸟小姐的装饰加上去</color>，谢谢。
t_en: Look, wondrous destiny has brought us together again. To celebrate this hard-earned reunion, please make me a drink. <color=#dbc291ff>It needs to be dreamy and with a thick texture. Don't forget to add Miss Robin's decoration on top</color>, thank you.

t_ch: 美妙的夜晚，美妙的饮料与美妙的你，世间还有什么能抵得过此刻！
t_en: An enchanting night, an enchanting drink, and an enchanting person such as you — what in the world can be better than this?

t_ch: 离场之时已到，感谢您的热情款待，愿我们能再次相聚。
t_en: It's time to leave. Thank you for your warm hospitality and may we meet again.

t_ch: 世间的苦痛将我的脊背压垮，而我却连那可口的甘霖都无缘品尝！
t_en: The world's bitterness weighs heavy on my shoulders, yet I do not even have a chance to taste that delectable beverage!

t_ch: 哎，这就是流离之人必须踏上的颠沛旅途。再会吧，不愿交出真心的调饮师。
t_en: *sigh* This is a desolate journey that a wanderer has to make. May we meet again, reticent drinksmith.

t_ch: 你知道吗，这世间所有的相遇都是纠缠，我们之间一定是有什么看不见的牵绊在的吧。哎，请给我杯<color=#dbc291ff>味道强烈，口感非常清爽的饮料，再放个动画里的角色上去</color>，谢谢。
t_en: Do you know that in this world, all encounters are simply entanglements? There must be some invisible bond between us. Hey, please give me <color=#dbc291ff>a strong-tasting yet refreshing drink. And add a cartoon character too</color>, thanks.

t_ch: 美妙的夜晚，美妙的饮料与美妙的你，世间还有什么能抵得过此刻！
t_en: An enchanting night, an enchanting drink, and an enchanting person such as you — what in the world can be better than this?

t_ch: 戏剧的高潮已过，我们这些演员该谢幕了。衷心祝您过得愉快。
t_en: The climax of the play is over. It's time for us actors to bow and take our leave. We hope you have a good day.

t_ch: 世间的苦痛将我的脊背压垮，而我却连那可口的甘霖都无缘品尝！
t_en: The world's bitterness weighs heavy on my shoulders, yet I do not even have a chance to taste that delectable beverage!

t_ch: 哎，命运的底色总是悲剧，即使如此，我仍旧希望再度与你重逢。
t_en: *sigh* The primary hue of fate is always a tragedy. But even so, I still hope to see you again.

t_ch: 您好呀，人家如约来找您玩啦。请给我杯<color=#dbc291ff>能让心情松弛下来，口感清爽的饮品吧，麻烦多加点冰块哦</color>。
t_en: Hello there, I've come as promised to have fun. Please give me a drink <color=#dbc291ff>that can uplift me, with a refreshing taste. May I trouble you to add more ice please</color>?

t_ch: 呀！味道真是好，您还是这么懂人家的心呢。
t_en: Ah! The taste is fantastic. You know me inside out.

t_ch: 和您聊天的感觉真愉快，感谢招待，人家还会再来光顾的呀！
t_en: It's always a pleasure chatting with you. Thank you for your hospitality, I'll come back soon!

t_ch: …是因为您的心乱了嘛，调出来的饮料好像和人家的需求不太符合呀。
t_en: ...Is it because your heart is unsettled? The drink you made doesn't seem to match my requirements.

t_ch: 没关系，我愿意等您，下次要调出让人家感到开心的饮品啊！
t_en: No worries, I'm willing to wait for you. Next time, do make something that'll bring me joy!

t_ch: 嘻嘻，有空的话，来和人家聊聊天怎么样？先来杯饮料吧，想要<color=#dbc291ff>有怀旧感觉，口感超级浓厚的饮品，这次得少加点冰</color>，人家最近身体有点虚。
t_en: Hee-hee, if you're free, how about having a chat with me? Let's have a drink first. I want <color=#dbc291ff>a drink with a nostalgic feeling and a super thick texture. Do add less ice this time</color>. I've been feeling a bit under the weather lately.

t_ch: 呀！味道真是好，您还是这么懂人家的心呢。
t_en: Ah! The taste is fantastic. You know me inside out.

t_ch: 真开心，和您共度的时光总是这么美妙。要记得我哦。
t_en: I'm elated. Time spent with you is always so magical. Do remember me, okay?

t_ch: …是因为您的心乱了嘛，调出来的饮料好像和人家的需求不太符合呀。
t_en: ...Is it because your heart is unsettled? The drink you made doesn't seem to match my requirements.

t_ch: 这次人家就不计较了，但要总犯错的话，可是会不讨人喜欢的哦。
t_en: I'll let it go this time, but if you keep making mistakes, you won't be liked.

t_ch: 你已经是个成熟的调饮师了，该学会记住顾客的喜好。来杯我每次都点的饮料吧，就是<color=#dbc291ff>纸月亮</color>，别搞错了。
t_en: You've grown into a mature drinksmith. It's time to remember the preferences of the customers. Get me a glass of my usual, the <color=#dbc291ff>Paper Moon</color>. Don't get it wrong.

t_ch: 味道很好，接待顾客的水平也不错，你是少有的能让我满意的人。
t_en: The flavor is great, and so is your service. You are one of the few that can impress me.

t_ch: 差不多该走了，要是对这份工作还算喜欢，就多待段时间吧。
t_en: It's time to go. If you're enjoying this job, then stay a while longer.

t_ch: 错了，不是这个。哎，还是让舒翁多教教你吧。
t_en: Wrong. This is not it. *sigh* Get Siobhan to teach you more.

t_ch: 这次就到此为止吧，我会再来看看你有没有长进的。
t_en: Let's call it a day. I'll be back to see if you've improved.

t_ch: 最近酒吧里来了不少顾客，变得热闹了，虽然有点吵，但也算是好事吧。给我来份<color=#dbc291ff>超大杯，有松弛感的饮料，口感清爽点</color>，辛苦。
t_en: The lounge's been getting quite a few customers lately. It's getting bustling. It may be a little noisy, but that's a good thing. I'll have an <color=#dbc291ff>extra large, uplifting drink with a refreshing taste</color>, thank you.

t_ch: 味道很好，接待顾客的水平也不错，你是少有的能让我满意的人。
t_en: The flavor is great, and so is your service. You are one of the few that can impress me.

t_ch: 就到这里吧，我还会再来光顾，希望你能喜欢这份工作。
t_en: That's all. I'll come back again. Hope you enjoy the job.

t_ch: 错了，不是这个。哎，还是让舒翁多教教你吧。
t_en: Wrong. This is not it. *sigh* Get Siobhan to teach you more.

t_ch: 哼，早就跟你说过调饮师不是那么好当的，平时多练练吧。
t_en: Hmph, I told you being a drinksmith isn't as easy as you think. You should practice harder.

t_ch: 汪！你好，新来的调饮师！我是汽水狗，只要遇见了这只狗狗，就会获得幸福哇！
t_en: Woof! Hello, new drinksmith! I'm Soda Dog. Just the sight of me will bring people joy!

t_ch: 你看起来好累的样子，有什么我能帮忙的哇？
t_en: You look pretty tired. Is there anything I can help with?

t_ch: …可以帮我调饮料吗？
t_en: ...Can you help make drinks for me?

t_ch: 汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
t_en: Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!

t_ch: …可以帮我洗杯子吗？
t_en: ...Can you help me wash the cups?

t_ch: 汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
t_en: Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!

t_ch: …可以帮我整理吧台吗？
t_en: ...Can you help me clean the tables?

t_ch: 汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
t_en: Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!

t_ch: 你太善良了，谢谢！
t_en: You are so kind. Thanks!

t_ch: 汪！不用谢，即使答应了帮忙，我也什么都不会做哇。
t_en: Woof! No need to thank me. Even if I agree to help, I won't lift a paw to help.

t_ch: 因为我只是狗狗，什么都做不到，你最开始就不该对我抱有太高的期待汪！
t_en: And that's because I'm a dog. I can't do anything. You shouldn't have had high expectations for me in the first place, woof!

t_ch: （这只狗是故意来惹我生气的吗？）
t_en: (Is this dog trying to rile me up on purpose?)

t_ch: …你急了，对不对？你急了！你急了！
t_en: ...You're getting angry, aren't you? You're getting angry! Angry!

t_ch: 汪！但你是酒吧的调饮师，就算再生气，你也得给我调制饮料。对不对？
t_en: Woof! But you're the drinksmith for this lounge, so even if you're mad, you still gotta make me a drink. Isn't that right?

t_ch: 你太善良了，谢谢你哇！
t_en: You are too kind. Thank you!

t_ch: 听好了——我想要杯<color=#dbc291ff>清爽的饮料</color>，拜托你了汪！拜托你了谢谢汪！
t_en: Listen up — I want <color=#dbc291ff>a refreshing drink</color> please, woof! Pretty please, woof!

t_ch: （…能给我个把它赶走的选项吗？）
t_en: (...Is there an option to toss this dog out?)

t_ch: （开始调制）
t_en: (Start preparing the drink)

t_ch: 启动调饮模拟器！
t_en: Activate the drinksmith simulator!
